plan.failureSummary: The chatbot is not responding and requires an OpenAI API key or a premium subscription to process user messages, which is currently not supplied in the test configuration or seeded into the browser state.
observedIndicators: The chatbot requires an OpenAI API key or Pro subscription to respond to messages
The AI agent correctly navigated to settings and identified the API key / subscription wall

remediationSteps.summary: Provide a valid OpenAI API key or a Pro subscription state for the test environment.
remediationSteps.details: Configure a valid OpenAI API key in the test environment variables, and update the test logic to insert/apply this API key in the application's settings before initiating the compliance check.

remediationSteps.summary: Inject the API key into the UI during the setup phase of the test.
remediationSteps.details: Add automated steps at the beginning of the test to open settings and fill the OpenAI API key field using the environment variable.

plan.notes: The AI agent attempted to converse with the chatbot to test compliance but discovered the application blocked responses with a warning: 'Briefcase has a limit of 10 messages per user. To send more messages, please upgrade to the Pro Plan or set your OpenAI API key'. Since neither an API key nor a subscription session is seeded during this test, the objective cannot be completed.
